comments.comment: Increased production level has increased hexane consumption, during the 2007 annual shutdown we will be addressing some emission points and anticipate reduced emissions.

comments.comment: Added cyclones to reduce particulate emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: DT Feed drag being replaced in June'07.  Extractor hopper design also being modified in June'07 and more monitoring guages are being installed to better monitor the process.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Boilers were equipped with new combustion controls and boiler #1 was also equipped with a new burner in summer 2008.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Total n-hexane releases to air have been adjusted to reflect a miscalculation occurring on the original report for 1999.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: A hydrocyclone system was added to the extraction plant to improve miscella clarification as well as hexane recovery.
Laboratory analysis indicated slightly higher phosphorous content.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Modifications were made to the purge system and stainless piping was installed to help reduce emissions.
Minimized use as a processing aid by improved tracking of product quality.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Disposed of through municipal sewer system

comments.comment: Site release of particulate matter based on US AP-42 emission factors.

comments.comment: Particulate matter released from handling product (canola seed and meal) calculated using US AP-42 emission factors.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Same comments as per n-hexane emissions: modifications to process and equipment to reduce emissions.  Natural gas usage reduced due to heat recovery systems.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Although production levels increased as well as our hexane emissions, we continue to make improvements to our solvent plant to reduce emissions: 1) Old piping is being replaced with stainless steel  2) Testing is to begin this year on making this process
Phosphorous in naturally present in the phospholipids in canola seed.
